title: Door Knocking
description: A mod allowing for knocking on doors when using attacking with empty main hand!
body:
# Door Knocking

A Minecraft mod that allows players to knock on doors when attacking such a Block!

Mod based on froyo4u [Door Knocker](https://github.com/froyo4u/Door-Knocker)
 
Commissioned by [crimulus](https://github.com/crimulus)
